In our example `a-b-a-b-a-b`:
- `supportSet.card = 2`, `edgeSet.card = 1`, `p.length = 5`: `2 + 1 ≤ 5 + 1` yes.

In `a-b-a-b-c`:
- `supportSet.card = 3`, `edgeSet.card = 2`, `p.length = 4`: `3 + 2 ≤ 4 + 1` yes.
